title: Interesting Screen Shot
wikitext:
[]: Interesting Screen Shot             Quote Post by Millions Livio » Sun Oct 01, 2006 2:17 pm I was sent this link earlier today and have yet to be able to figure out where this screen shot is from. It seems like I've seen this scene before but do not remember where. Here is the link.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Oct 01, 2006 3:51 pm It's not from any version of the series or films that I've seen, I can say that much. One of the games or artbooks, mayhaps?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Oct 01, 2006 5:14 pm One word: homage.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Oct 01, 2006 5:18 pm Looks like a screen cap from animation. Probably from another anime.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sun Oct 01, 2006 6:09 pm I was thinking that too, and from the image quality, I'm tempted to say that the source file is a fansub...

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sun Oct 01, 2006 7:06 pm

[]:             Quote Post by Millions Livio » Sun Oct 01, 2006 9:02 pm Perhaps, but as a graphic artist it does look rather well blended if it is. Although at that low quality and low dimensions it would be easier to add in. Nonetheless, I does appear to be from a different anime possibly, however the art style is rather similar.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Mon Oct 02, 2006 12:37 am It's certainly not from any of the 26 episodes. But another anime? Seeing Asuka's and Rei's head it could only be something from Eva, no?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Mon Oct 02, 2006 1:00 am No, I'm pretty sure it's a homage to Eva in another anime. EDIT+++ The image somewhat larger. According to the person who posted it on LJ it's original filename was untitled.jpg.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Mon Oct 02, 2006 9:06 am Hmm... *Infernal laughter* I have a few ideas how one might give a little "bonus" to the picture... like Gendo dancing on the stage... What made me wonder is that Asuka is not sleeping, and I can't find Shinji, nor anybody else from their class, nor the Almighty NERV Staff... :?

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Mon Oct 02, 2006 11:24 am FauÃŸtin wrote: What made me wonder is that Asuka is not sleeping, and I can't find Shinji, nor anybody else from their class, nor the Almighty NERV Staff... :?

[]:             Quote Post by Millions Livio » Mon Oct 02, 2006 7:01 pm They speculated the guy on the top center being cut off was Shinji, and possibly Misato on the top right, who knows.

[]:             Quote Post by Darius » Mon Oct 02, 2006 7:10 pm Ya, i wish I knew as well...It's great that people pay homage and respect a great show like Eva =D.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Mon Oct 02, 2006 7:36 pm probably not a shop, reis uniform looks slightly different then the original.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Mon Oct 02, 2006 8:29 pm It resembles her uniform in the alternate universe shown in ep. 26.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Oct 03, 2006 2:17 pm FauÃŸtin wrote: Hmm... *Infernal laughter* I have a few ideas how one might give a little "bonus" to the picture... like Gendo dancing on the stage...

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Tue Oct 03, 2006 10:39 pm From the quality of the image, the black borders, and what appears to be a cropped scrub bar at the bottom (I don't know a beeter name atm) I'm still guessing screencap, most likely a fansub, that has a homage to Eva in it.

[]:             Quote Post by LordBlank » Sat Oct 07, 2006 8:06 pm Legend of the Past wrote: FauÃŸtin wrote: What made me wonder is that Asuka is not sleeping, and I can't find Shinji, nor anybody else from their class, nor the Almighty NERV Staff... :?

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Mon Oct 09, 2006 7:42 am Y'know... I've always imagined myself staring at the back of Asuka's head... But this isn't what I had in mind. I'd have to go with the theory that it's a homage to Evangelion, animation does that all the time.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Tue Oct 10, 2006 10:54 am Eternal Yamcha wrote: Y'know... I've always imagined myself staring at the back of Asuka's head...
